text.title: GitOps — Repository Structure Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on env + tenant + tooling preference.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: design-layout
step.action: Lock base + overlays pattern per workload; document.

step.name: allocate-tenants
step.action: Allocate per-team folders with namespaces + RBAC.

step.name: define-promotion-policy
step.action: Document promotion chain + approvers per step.

step.name: write-readmes-validate
step.action: Add README per overlay; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
